bannerStory.title: White House eyes Iran’s parliament speaker Ghalibaf as potential US-backed leader: Report
bannerStory.whyItMatters: A report suggests the White House is considering Iran's parliament speaker Ghalibaf as a potential US-backed leader for the country.

stories.title: Israeli strike kills medic in attack on ambulance in south Lebanon
stories.whyItMatters: An Israeli strike in south Lebanon killed a medic during an attack on an ambulance.

stories.title: Air strike hits Iraqi militia base south of Baghdad injuring four
stories.whyItMatters: An air strike targeted an Iraqi militia base south of Baghdad, resulting in four injuries.

stories.title: Explosions heard over Tehran
stories.whyItMatters: Explosions were reported over Tehran, indicating potential security incidents or conflict escalation.

stories.title: UK saw Israel as ‘chief problem’ to curb Iran’s nuclear ambitions
stories.whyItMatters: Declassified information reveals that the UK considered Israel to be the primary obstacle in efforts to curb Iran's nuclear ambitions.

stories.title: Revealed: The internal police guidance on chanting ‘death to the IDF’
stories.whyItMatters: Internal police guidance regarding the chanting of 'death to the IDF' has been revealed.

stories.title: Israel's second-largest airline moves its operations to Jordan and Egypt
stories.whyItMatters: Israel's second-largest airline has relocated its operations to Jordan and Egypt.
